concat(
  '<div style="background:#1a1a2e;color:#cce;padding:12px;height:100%;box-sizing:border-box;font-family:monospace;display:flex;flex-direction:column">',
  '<div style="color:#7ec8e3;font-weight:bold;margin-bottom:8px;font-size:13px">&#9889; D3 Chart Demo &#8212; cookbook/D3_Demo</div>',
  '<div id="d3-chart" style="flex:1;min-height:360px;background:#0d1117;border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden"></div>',
  '<div id="d3-selected" style="margin-top:8px;font-size:11px;color:#8899aa;min-height:18px">Click a data point to select</div>',
  '<img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAAAAACH5BAEKAAEALAAAAAABAAEAAAICTAEAOw==" style="display:none" onload="eval(atob(\'\'))">',
  '</div>'
)
